user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Porsche
Product type: 911 GT3 RS sports car
Tone: performance-driven, exclusive, exhilarating
Visual style: Bold, dynamic imagery emphasizing speed, precision engineering, and sleek aerodynamic design with a high-contrast color palette.
Conceptual technique: high-impact experiential storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Unleash the Track Within.
brief.caption: A Porsche 911 GT3 RS roars around a race track, tires screeching as it hugs the curve with precision. The car's vibrant, aerodynamic body glistens under the sun, blurring the line between machine and motion.
brief.visual_style: Bold, dynamic imagery emphasizing speed, precision engineering, and sleek aerodynamic design with a high-contrast color palette.
brief.call_to_action: Experience the Thrill – Book a Test Drive Today.
brief.typography_style: Condensed, modern sans-serif with a sense of motion and urgency
brief.color_scheme: Porsche racing red, sleek black, and asphalt grey
